chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1009 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4200/25 3.For hearing of main case 09-07-2025 Mr. Muhammad Zohaib Azam, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G. ****** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that purpose of this petition has been served; therefore, under instructions he does not wish to press the same along with pending application. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
